# requireAdministratorForAssociation

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that determines whether to require an administrator password to change networks.

## Declaration

```swift
var requireAdministratorForAssociation: Bool { get set }
```

## Configuring Settings

- **rememberJoinedNetworks**: A Boolean value that determines whether to remember all joined Wi-Fi networks unless the user specifies otherwise when joining a particular Wi-Fi network.
- **requireAdministratorForPower**: A Boolean value that determines whether to require an administrator password to change the interface power state.
- **requireAdministratorForIBSSMode**: A Boolean value that determines whether to require an administrator password to create a computer-to-computer network.
